creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
This is a port for development version of gajim, from SVN. Dear
commiter, could you repo-copy net-im/gajim before?

The goal of Gajim is to provide a full featured and easy to use Jabber
client. Gajim works nicely with GNOME, but does not require it to run.
It is released under the GNU General Public License.

FEATURES:
 * Tabbed chat window
 * Group chat support (with MUC protocol)
 * Emoticons, Avatars, File transfer, Room Bookmarks
 * Metacontacts Support
 * Trayicon, Speller, extented chat history functionalities
 * TLS and GPG support (with SSL legacy support)
 * Transport Registration support
 * Service Discovery including Nodes
 * Wikipedia, dictionary and search engine lookup
 * Multiple accounts support
 * DBus Capabilities.
 * XML Console
 * Gajim is available in 16 languages

You might want to install deskutils/notification-daemon for pretty
pop-ups or devel/py-psyco for improved Python performance.

WWW: http://www.gajim.org/

mkdir -p gajim-devel > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - gajim-devel/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >gajim-devel/Makefile << 'END-of-gajim-devel/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	gajim-devel
X# Date created:				Sun Nov 26 16:36:07 MSK 2006
X# Whom:					Denis Shaposhnikov <dsh@vlink.ru>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	gajim
XPORTVERSION=	20061129
XCATEGORIES=	net-im
XMASTER_SITES=	http://ports.internal.vlink.ru/distfiles/
XPKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2006-11-29
X
XMAINTAINER=	dsh@vlink.ru
XCOMMENT=	Gajim is a Jabber client based on a plugin system
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gtkspell.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gtkspell
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	pygtk2
XUSE_PYTHON=	2.4+
XUSE_XLIB=	yes
X
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--mandir=${MANPREFIX}/man
XCONFIGURE_ENV+=	CFLAGS="${CFLAGS} -I ${X11BASE}/include" PYTHON=${PYTHON_CMD}
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
XPLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
XPLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
X.endif
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-0.10.1.8
X
XMAN1=		gajim.1 gajim-remote.1
X
XEMOTICONS=	animated static
XICONSETS=	crystal dcraven gnome goojim gossip gota jabberbulb nuvola \
X		simplebulb stellar sun transports
X
Xpost-patch:
X.for i in gajim-remote.py gajim.py history_manager.py
X		${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '1,1s/python/${PYTHON_VERSION}/' \
X			${WRKSRC}/src/$i
X.endfor
X
Xpost-install:
X		${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons
X		(cd ${WRKSRC}/data/emoticons && \
X		${CP} -R ${EMOTICONS} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons)
X
X		${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons -type d -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons -type f -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE}
X
X		${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets
X		(cd ${WRKSRC}/data/iconsets && \
X		${CP} -R ${ICONSETS} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets)
X
X		${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets -type d -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets -type f -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if ${PYTHON_REL} >= 250
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/_sqlite3.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlite3
X.else
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pysqlite2/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-pysqlite21
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-gajim-devel/Makefile

X# New ports collection makefile for:	gajim-devel

X# Whom:					Denis Shaposhnikov <dsh@vlink.ru>
X#

X#
X
XPORTNAME=	gajim
XPORTVERSION=	20061129
XCATEGORIES=	net-im
XMASTER_SITES=	http://ports.internal.vlink.ru/distfiles/
XPKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2006-11-29
X
XMAINTAINER=	dsh@vlink.ru
XCOMMENT=	Gajim is a Jabber client based on a plugin system
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	gtkspell.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gtkspell
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	pygtk2
XUSE_PYTHON=	2.4+
XUSE_XLIB=	yes
X
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--mandir=${MANPREFIX}/man
XCONFIGURE_ENV+=	CFLAGS="${CFLAGS} -I ${X11BASE}/include" PYTHON=${PYTHON_CMD}
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
XPLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
XPLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
X.endif
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-0.10.1.8
X
XMAN1=		gajim.1 gajim-remote.1
X
XEMOTICONS=	animated static
XICONSETS=	crystal dcraven gnome goojim gossip gota jabberbulb nuvola \
X		simplebulb stellar sun transports
X
Xpost-patch:
X.for i in gajim-remote.py gajim.py history_manager.py
X		${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '1,1s/python/${PYTHON_VERSION}/' \
X			${WRKSRC}/src/$i
X.endfor
X
Xpost-install:
X		${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons
X		(cd ${WRKSRC}/data/emoticons && \
X		${CP} -R ${EMOTICONS} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons)
X
X		${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons -type d -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/emoticons -type f -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE}
X
X		${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets
X		(cd ${WRKSRC}/data/iconsets && \
X		${CP} -R ${ICONSETS} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets)
X
X		${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets -type d -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} 755
X		${FIND} ${DATADIR}/data/iconsets -type f -print0 | \
X			${XARGS} -0 ${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X

XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/_sqlite3.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlite3
X.else
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pysqlite2/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-pysqlite21
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

XThe goal of Gajim is to provide a full featured and easy to use Jabber
Xclient. Gajim works nicely with GNOME, but does not require it to run.
XIt is released under the GNU General Public License.
X
XFEATURES:
X * Tabbed chat window
X * Group chat support (with MUC protocol)
X * Emoticons, Avatars, File transfer, Room Bookmarks
X * Metacontacts Support
X * Trayicon, Speller, extented chat history functionalities
X * TLS and GPG support (with SSL legacy support)
X * Transport Registration support
X * Service Discovery including Nodes
X * Wikipedia, dictionary and search engine lookup
X * Multiple accounts support
X * DBus Capabilities.
X * XML Console
X * Gajim is available in 16 languages
X
XYou might want to install deskutils/notification-daemon for pretty
Xpop-ups or devel/py-psyco for improved Python performance.
X
XWWW: http://www.gajim.org/
